creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

I use GIT in conjunction with poudriere. Every time I manually make changes in the port, GIT complains. I have to again make changes to make it happy again.

The proper place to correct this problem should not be on my end. This is the second time this problem has arisen. I am not sure why it is happening, but it is not on my end and I (and others) should not be responsible for correcting it.
